title: Moonpay - missing card option in widget

actions.value:
If you don't see the credit / debit card option inside the Moonpay widget, it is possible that you reached your monthly limit.
It will reset 30 days after your last purchase using cards. 
You can however use Google pay or PayPal where you can use the same card, if you linked that to those payment methods.

raw_title: Moonpay - missing card option in widget
